rawAssistant: Don't waste my time with small claims; I'm after that relic known as the Echoing Sceptre. Whoever grasps it will claim not just its historical value but also a seat at the high table of Hollowfen trainers. The prestige alone is worth risking everything to secure, and I won't let some amateur chance upon it first.
